en_title: PlayStation State of Play Showcase Flooded by Demands for Destiny 3
cn_title: PlayStation发布会遭《命运》玩家刷屏：我们要《命运3》
subtitle: 刷屏求新作
opus_summary: 在PlayStation State of Play发布会上，官方Twitch聊天室被《命运》玩家刷屏，高呼“我们要《命运3》”。此前Bungie宣布将逐步停止对《命运2》的支持，全力投入《失落星船：马拉松》和新项目，彭博社报道称Bungie可能进行大规模裁员，且《命运3》并未在积极开发中。玩家计划在6月9日《命运2》最终内容更新时，试图超越《失落星船：马拉松》的Steam同时在线峰值（77,359人），以证明对《命运》新作的需求。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation's highly anticipated State of Play event was flooded by demands for Destiny 3 . During the opening of the show, PlayStation's official Twitch chat was almost completely dominated by cries for a new Destiny game.
paragraphs.cn: PlayStation备受期待的State of Play发布会遭到了《命运3》需求的刷屏。在节目开场期间，PlayStation官方Twitch聊天室几乎完全被要求推出新《命运》游戏的呼声所淹没。

paragraphs.en: The chat was spamming Destiny-related emotes, along with the hashtag #WeWantDestiny3. The YouTube chat was a bit quieter, but there was still a visible amount of people calling for a new game in the Bungie franchise. It came as a bit of a surprise, as PlayStation opened the show with an in-depth look at its most anticipated game of the year, Marvel's Wolverine . And yet, on the surface at least, commenters were far more focused on demanding a new Destiny game.
paragraphs.cn: 聊天室里充斥着《命运》相关的表情符号和话题标签#WeWantDestiny3。YouTube聊天室稍显平静，但仍有相当数量的人在呼吁Bungie推出新作。这多少有些出人意料，因为PlayStation以年度最受期待游戏《漫威金刚狼》的深度展示开场。然而，至少表面上，评论者们更专注于要求一款新的《命运》游戏。

paragraphs.en: This comes nearly two weeks after it was announced that Bungie would be winding down support on Destiny 2 and transitioning all of its focus to Marathon while incubating new projects. Bloomberg also reported that Bungie was preparing to layoff a 'significant' number of staff and that Destiny 3 was not in active development . That report actually cast doubt on Destiny 3 happening at all, given how much it would cost to produce the game. With Marathon currently failing to meet expectations and enthusiasm around Destiny 2 dwindling for the last couple of years, it's purported Sony may not feel as confident in giving the studio another $300+ million to make a game that wouldn't come out until the 2030s.
paragraphs.cn: 这发生在Bungie宣布将逐步停止对《命运2》的支持、将全部重心转向《失落星船：马拉松》并孵化新项目近两周之后。彭博社还报道称，Bungie正准备裁减「大量」员工，且《命运3》并未在积极开发中。考虑到制作这款游戏的巨大成本，该报道实际上对《命运3》能否问世提出了质疑。鉴于《失落星船：马拉松》目前未能达到预期，而《命运2》的热度在过去几年持续下降，据称索尼可能没有信心再给工作室3亿美元(约合人民币21亿元)以上，去制作一款要到2030年代才能面世的游戏。

paragraphs.en: As you might imagine, Destiny fans have been living in anguish since the news came out and they're determined to change Bungie/PlayStation's mind. Destiny fans are hoping to surpass Marathon's all-time concurrent player count on June 9, when Destiny 2's final content update releases, to show how much demand there is for new Destiny content. That would mean at least 77,359 players would all have to play Marathon at the same time on Steam. Whether or not they're able to actually accomplish this remains to be seen but, if there's a notable spike in players, it would be pretty impressive.
paragraphs.cn: 可想而知，《命运》粉丝们自消息传出后一直痛苦不堪，他们决心改变Bungie/PlayStation的想法。粉丝们希望在6月9日《命运2》最终内容更新发布时，超越《失落星船：马拉松》的历史最高同时在线玩家数，以展示对《命运》新内容的需求有多大。这意味着至少要有77,359名玩家同时在Steam上玩《失落星船：马拉松》。他们能否真正实现这一目标还有待观察，但如果玩家数量出现显著激增，那将相当令人印象深刻。

paragraphs.en: It seems unlikely players will be able to push Bungie and PlayStation into making a third Destiny game, unless Bungie is able to make some kind of smaller-scale spin-off that can be done cheaper and faster. It's not entirely clear what Bungie's future looks like, but the studio is reportedly interested in doing more stories in the Destiny universe.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家似乎不太可能迫使Bungie和PlayStation制作第三款《命运》游戏，除非Bungie能够制作某种成本更低、速度更快的小规模衍生作品。Bungie的未来尚不完全明朗，但据报道，该工作室有意在《命运》宇宙中讲述更多故事。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上通过@Cade_Onder找到他。
